message:
feat(search): Improve query execution, model downloads, and Tantivy index

Updates to the search module for better performance and reliability:

src/search/query.rs:
- Enhanced query parsing with field selection
- Improved semantic/hybrid mode scoring
- Better pagination with cursor-based results
- Added query explanation mode
- Enhanced aggregation by agent/workspace/date
- Improved timeout handling
- Better error context for search failures

src/search/model_download.rs:
- Improved atomic model installation
- Better checksum verification
- Progress reporting during downloads
- Retry logic with exponential backoff

src/search/tantivy.rs:
- Minor schema adjustments
- Improved segment merge policy

These changes support the daemon fallback testing (T7.3) by ensuring
search operations gracefully handle unavailable daemon scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
